title: For Chicago For Chicago Fire
lyrics:
For Chicago, for Chicago Fire,
For Chicago, for Chicago Fire,
We will follow you wherever you go!
description: Classic Chicago Fire supporter chant — one of the club's most recognizable terrace songs.

title: Chicago Fire Till I Die
lyrics:
Chicago Fire till I die, on this I do rely,
We will love you Chicago Fire, till the day we die.
description: Terrace pledge of lifelong support for the Fire.

title: We Are the Fire
lyrics:
We are the Fire, the mighty Fire,
We are the Fire, from Chicago!
description: Identity chant for the club's Fire nickname.

title: Burn Burn Burn
lyrics:
Burn, burn, burn, Chicago Fire burn,
Burn, burn, burn, till the league is overturned!
description: High-energy chant built around the Fire name.

title: Section 8 Is Here
lyrics:
Section 8 is here, Section 8 is here,
Loudest section in MLS, Section 8 is here!
description: Chant for Section 8, the independent Chicago Fire supporters group.

title: Let Your Light Shine
lyrics:
Let your light shine, let your light shine,
Chicago Fire, let your light shine!
description: Chant inspired by the club's 'Let Your Light Shine' motto.

title: Chicago Fire Ole Ole Ole
lyrics:
Ole, ole, ole ole! Ole, ole!
Chicago Fire, ole, ole!
description: Victory chant adapted from the universal Ole Ole Ole.

title: Fire Away
lyrics:
Fire away, fire away, Chicago Fire away,
Fire away, fire away, every single day!
description: Simple repetitive terrace chant.

title: Chicago Fire Allez Allez
lyrics:
Allez, allez, allez,
We are Chicago Fire, super Chicago Fire,
Allez, allez, allez!
description: Adapted allez-allez chant popular across global soccer.

title: MLS Original
lyrics:
Ninety-eight we won it all, Chicago Fire standing tall,
MLS original, the first of them all!
description: Chant celebrating the Fire's 1998 MLS Cup as an original MLS club.

title: 1998 MLS Cup Champions
lyrics:
Nineteen ninety-eight, we were great,
Chicago Fire, MLS Cup champions of the league!
description: Historical chant for the club's inaugural MLS Cup triumph.

title: Double in 98
lyrics:
Double in ninety-eight, double in ninety-eight,
Open Cup and MLS Cup, Chicago Fire was great!
description: Chant referencing the 1998 domestic double (MLS Cup and US Open Cup).

title: Soldier Field Belongs to Us
lyrics:
Soldier Field belongs to us,
Soldier Field belongs to us,
Everywhere we go, the people want to know,
Who we are, so we tell them.
description: Home end chant at Soldier Field.

title: Bridgeview Days
lyrics:
Bridgeview days, Bridgeview days,
Toyota Park memories never fade away!
description: Nostalgic chant referencing the club's former stadium in Bridgeview.

title: Chicago Fire Anthem
lyrics:
Chicago Fire, burning bright,
Red and white through day and night,
From the lakefront to the west,
Chicago Fire, you're the best!
description: Original-style fan anthem for the club.

title: Windy City Fire
lyrics:
Windy City Fire, Windy City Fire,
Chicago Fire, taking us higher!
description: Chant linking the club to Chicago's Windy City nickname.

title: Midwest Soccer Pride
lyrics:
Midwest soccer pride, Midwest soccer pride,
Chicago Fire, side by side!
description: Regional identity chant for Midwest soccer culture.

title: Polish Triangle Fire
lyrics:
Polish Triangle, Polish Triangle,
Chicago Fire, we all mingle!
description: Chant referencing Chicago's historic Polish Triangle neighborhood and fan culture.

title: Over Land and Sea and Chicago
lyrics:
We all follow Chicago Fire, over land and sea and Chicago,
We all follow Chicago Fire, on to victory!
description: Away-support chant adapted from English terrace traditions.

title: Chicago Fire We Love You
lyrics:
Chicago Fire, we love you, we do,
Chicago Fire, we love you, we do,
Chicago Fire, we love you, we do,
And Soldier Field is our home!
description: Simple love song for the club and stadium.

title: Red and White Army
lyrics:
Red and white army, red and white army,
Chicago Fire, the red and white army!
description: Terrace identity chant for the club's colors.

title: Fire on a Saturday
lyrics:
Fire on a Saturday, we're going out today,
For a game of football with the Chicago Fire!
description: Matchday terrace song for Saturday kickoffs.

title: La La La Chicago Fire
lyrics:
La la la la la, la la la la la,
La la la la la la la, Chicago Fire!
description: Simple la-la-la terrace chant used during matches.

title: Cuauhtémoc Blanco Song
lyrics:
Cuauhtémoc Blanco, magic on the pitch,
Cuauhtémoc Blanco, Chicago Fire's witch!
description: Player tribute for Mexican legend Cuauhtémoc Blanco.

title: Blanco La Ola
lyrics:
Blanco, Blanco, running with the ball,
Blanco, Blanco, best of them all!
description: Chant celebrating Cuauhtémoc Blanco's flair at Chicago Fire.

title: Hristo Stoichkov Song
lyrics:
Hristo, Hristo Stoichkov, Bulgarian king,
Hristo, Hristo Stoichkov, hear the Fire sing!
description: Tribute to Bulgarian legend Hristo Stoichkov.

title: Bastian Schweinsteiger Chant
lyrics:
Schweinsteiger, Schweinsteiger, World Cup winner here,
Schweinsteiger, Schweinsteiger, Fire legend we revere!
description: Chant for German World Cup winner Bastian Schweinsteiger.

title: Brian McBride Song
lyrics:
McBride, McBride, heading in the goal,
McBride, McBride, Fire in his soul!
description: Tribute to American legend and former captain Brian McBride.

title: Chris Armas Chant
lyrics:
Chris Armas, Chris Armas, engine of the team,
Chris Armas, Chris Armas, Fire's midfield dream!
description: Player tribute for former midfielder Chris Armas.

title: CJ Sapong Song
lyrics:
Sapong, Sapong, scoring for the Fire,
Sapong, Sapong, taking us higher!
description: Chant for forward CJ Sapong.

title: Xherdan Shaqiri Chant
lyrics:
Shaqiri, Shaqiri, left foot like a whip,
Shaqiri, Shaqiri, Chicago Fire's chip!
description: Player tribute for Swiss star Xherdan Shaqiri.

title: Chris Mueller Song
lyrics:
Mueller, Mueller, running down the wing,
Mueller, Mueller, hear the Fire sing!
description: Chant for winger Chris Mueller.

title: Gabriel Slonina Chant
lyrics:
Slonina, Slonina, standing in the goal,
Slonina, Slonina, Chicago Fire's soul!
description: Goalkeeper tribute for Gabriel Slonina.

title: Fire Goal Celebration
lyrics:
Score a goal, fire celebration,
Chicago Fire all across the nation!
description: Post-goal terrace chant.

title: Beat the Crew
lyrics:
Beat the Crew, beat the Crew, beat the Crew today,
Hell is real, but the Fire's here to stay!
description: Rivalry chant against Columbus Crew.

title: Beat Sporting KC
lyrics:
Beat Sporting, beat Sporting, beat Sporting today,
Heartland rivalry, Fire all the way!
description: Rivalry chant against Sporting Kansas City.

title: Beat St Louis City
lyrics:
Beat St Louis, beat St Louis, beat St Louis today,
Midwest derby, Fire all the way!
description: Regional rivalry chant against St. Louis CITY SC.

title: Playoffs Fire
lyrics:
Playoffs fire, playoffs fire,
Chicago Fire marching on!
description: Playoff push chant for late-season matches.

title: Fire Drums
lyrics:
Beat the drums, beat the drums, Fire drums are here,
Chicago Fire supporters, loudest in the atmosphere!
description: Chant for the supporter drumming sections.

title: Smoke and Flares
lyrics:
Smoke and flares, smoke and flares,
Chicago Fire filling the air!
description: Tifo and smoke celebration chant.

title: Fire Away Days
lyrics:
Fire away days, Fire away days,
Following Chicago every mile!
description: Dedicated travelling supporters chant.

title: I Will Follow You Into the Fire
lyrics:
I will follow you into the Fire,
I will follow you into the Fire,
Chicago Fire, wherever you go!
description: Terrace song play on the club name inspired by supporter culture.

title: Chicago Till I Die
lyrics:
Chicago till I die, on this I do rely,
We will love you Chicago Fire, till the day we die.
description: City-focused variant of the till-I-die pledge.

title: Original 10 Pride
lyrics:
Original ten pride, original ten pride,
Chicago Fire, MLS since ninety-five!
description: Chant celebrating the Fire as one of MLS's original ten clubs.

title: Lamar Hunt Open Cup
lyrics:
Open Cup champions, Open Cup champions,
Chicago Fire, trophy hunters!
description: Chant celebrating multiple US Open Cup wins.

title: Fire Night
lyrics:
Fire night, fire night, everything's alright,
Chicago Fire under the Soldier Field lights!
description: Evening kickoff atmosphere chant.

title: Jump Around Soldier Field
lyrics:
Jump around! Jump around! Jump around!
Chicago Fire, Soldier Field, jump around!
description: Stadium hype chant inspired by jump-around traditions.

title: Chicago Fire Forever
lyrics:
Chicago Fire forever, whatever the weather,
Red and white together, now and forever!
description: Closing terrace song affirming long-term loyalty.

title: Fuego Fuego
lyrics:
Fuego, fuego, Chicago Fire fuego,
Fuego, fuego, burning through the league-o!
description: Bilingual fire-themed terrace chant.

title: Lakefront to the Loop
lyrics:
From the lakefront to the Loop,
Chicago Fire, we follow you!
description: Geographic chant referencing Chicago neighborhoods.
